title: From The Caves
description: Adventure horror with body horror elements.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad63ce9b655d9ec63da7cc2efee7609ed4c85086_0.webp)

## **WARNING: PHOTOSENSITIVITY**

- This mod contains flashing light effects that may cause discomfort or seizures for individuals with photosensitive epilepsy or similar sensitivities.

- You can disable these effects at any time using the command:
/fromthecaves photosensitiveMode

![shadow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/967cb3721032f40680a578805bbbfb23e303d28f_0.webp)

From the Caves brings in the concept of a single stalking demon that changes forms and follows you throughout your journey in caves and on the surface. It can behave in a variety of ways, interacting with the world by affecting blocks and mobs in different ways. The mod has lore inspired by movies and real-life events, which is revealed as you explore some of the structures and dialogues (coming soon) the mod has to offer. The upcoming 0.7 update will introduce many body horror and adventure horror elements.

Progressing through its phase system also requires the player to take some kind of action. You have to release it, anger it, or do something to advance the entity to the next phase. There are three phases at the moment, but more are being worked for the future. The mod also introduces new mechanics such as exorcism, holy water, crosses, and more, along with new blocks and items that are very important to its functionality.

After it is released, the entity can follow you around in caves and on the surface, sometimes observing you from a distance, and other times possessing blocks or entities. It can appear in a variety of ways and take on different physical forms, which affect its behavior.

![shadow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/967cb3721032f40680a578805bbbfb23e303d28f_0.webp)

​​
Credits:

Logotype: Alhyuumaa

Pre 0.7 Structures: Nicko_Barz

Some suggestions: Members from my Discord & moderators

![shadow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/967cb3721032f40680a578805bbbfb23e303d28f_0.webp)


IF YOU EXPERIENCE CRASHES ON STARTUP, INSTALL GECKOLIB

**Sxilverr made a PATCH for this mod (all of these errors have been fixed by me for 0.7, but you can use this until 0.7 releases)**:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/from-the-caves-patch

This mod does not aim to make fun of or portray any religion or belief in a negative way.


![shadow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/967cb3721032f40680a578805bbbfb23e303d28f_0.webp)


License thingies:



You are NOT allowed to:

Modify or redistribute this mod (Except for creating ports or patches, as long as proper credit is given)
Reupload this mod to any website for profit or monetization

You ARE allowed to:

Use this mod for personal gameplay
Use it for modpacks / public modpacks, including monetized ones
Share links to the official download page
Create ports or patches for this mod, as long as proper credit is given to the mod and me

For permissions, contact me via CurseForge private messages or Discord


![shadow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/967cb3721032f40680a578805bbbfb23e303d28f_0.webp)

<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Phases**

Phase 1: Triggered when player uses the Haunted Cross in the ground cross found in Amos Mineshafts.

Phase 2: Triggers when Phase 2: Triggers when Anger value reaches 20 (50 in the upcoming version).

**PHASE 3, PHASE 4 and PHASE 5 ARE BEING WORKED...**
